description.content: Get an [Agent](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/agents/Agent) in an Environment by its id.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Get a signed url to download the latest [Agent](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/agents/Agent) in an Environment by its id
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
A list of all [Agents](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/agents/Agent) for an Environment with pagination support.

query.description: Page number for pagination (1-based indexing). Default is 1, meaning the first page starts at 1, not 0.

response.name: A list of all Agents for an Environment.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Get a [Connection](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/agents/Agent#installing-connections) in an Environment by its id.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
A list of all [Connections](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/agents/Agent#installing-connections) for an Environment with pagination support.

query.description: Page number for pagination (1-based indexing). Default is 1, meaning the first page starts at 1, not 0.

response.name: A list of all Connections for an Environment.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Get a [File](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/files/FileBrowser) in an Environment by its url-encoded [URI](https://docs.ganymede.bio/sdk/FileTags#get_file_url).
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

A list of filtered [Files](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/files/FileBrowser). Each File response contains its [URI](https://docs.ganymede.bio/sdk/FileTags#get_file_url), which is its unique identifier.

query.description: Page number for pagination (1-based indexing). Default is 1, meaning the first page starts at 1, not 0.
a tag in the format of tagName:tagValue
Include archived files in results. When false or omitted, only non-archived files are returned.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Get a signed url to download a [File](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/files/FileBrowser) in an Environment by its url-encoded [URI](https://docs.ganymede.bio/sdk/FileTags#get_file_url).
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Archive or unarchive multiple [Files](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/files/FileBrowser) in an Environment by their URIs. Only 100 files are supported per request.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Get a signed url to upload a [File](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/files/FileBrowser) in an Environment. The url will valid for 15 minutes.
Uploads to a Ganymede bucket will require a PUT request with the header "x-goog-content-length-range" set with value "0,10000000", the header "x-goog-meta-initiatortype" set with value "API", and the header "x-goog-meta-initiatorid" set with the initiator value that was passed in the request body.
Uploads to a customer S3 Bucket managed by Ganymede will require a "POST" request with formData including all "formData" returned with the upload response from Ganymede as well as the field "file" with the file string contents.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Add or remove file tags in bulk. Only 100 files are supported per request.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Get a [Flow](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/flows/FlowEditor#flows) in an Environment by its id. Returns pipeline and settings objects that can be sent directly to updateFlowPipeline and updateFlowSettings.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Create a new empty [Flow](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/flows/FlowEditor) in an Environment.

A unique flow id will be generated based on the provided name.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Get all [Flows](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/flows/FlowEditor#flows) in an Environment with pagination support.

query.description: Page number for pagination (1-based indexing). Default is 1, meaning the first page starts at 1, not 0.

response.name: Get all Flows in an Environment

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Update the pipeline tasks of an existing [Flow](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/flows/FlowEditor) in an Environment.

This is a TOTAL REPLACEMENT - the provided tasks map will completely replace all existing tasks in the flow. All other settings (schedule, owner, etc.) will be preserved.

response.name: The Flow pipeline was updated successfully.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: The Flow does not exist in the environment.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: One or more operators referenced in tasks do not exist in the environment.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Update settings of an existing [Flow](https://docs.ganymede.bio/app/flows/FlowEditor) in an Environment.

This is a PARTIAL UPDATE - only the provided fields will be updated. The DAG structure (tasks) will not be modified.

response.name: The Flow settings were updated successfully.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: The Flow does not exist in the environment.
